title: Israeli strikes pound Tehran
description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates -- Israel pounded Tehran with airstrikes Friday as Iranians marked Nowruz, or the Persian New Year, in the midst of a war that has sent shock waves through the global economy and risked drawing Iran's Arab neighbors directly into the conflict.

title: To’o try defies belief in NRL bloodbath
description: Panthers star Brian To’o has just scored not only the try of the 2026 season but one of the best ever as Penrith put the blowtorch to the Roosters.

title: Three men deny plot to sexually assault man's drugged wife

title: Police cars damaged after collision with vehicle 'travelling dangerously' on the wrong side of Hartlepool's Easington Road
